---
title: "Midterm analysis (mock)"
subtitle: "Short Python + one-page Adzuna sample (full report: `final_project/midterm.qmd`)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

**Note:** This page runs a **single** API request (first search page only). Set `ADZUNA_APP_ID` and `ADZUNA_APP_KEY` in your environment (or GitHub Actions secrets) to fetch live data; otherwise the chunk falls back to a placeholder table.

## Introduction (mock)

Placeholder: Canadian data-job postings and salary patterns (Adzuna API). The chunk below demonstrates a minimal fetch at render time.

## One-page API sample

```{python}
import os

import pandas as pd
import requests

app_id = os.environ.get("ADZUNA_APP_ID", "")
app_key = os.environ.get("ADZUNA_APP_KEY", "")

if app_id and app_key:
    url = "https://api.adzuna.com/v1/api/jobs/ca/search/1"
    params = {
        "app_id": app_id,
        "app_key": app_key,
        "what": "data",
        "results_per_page": 10,
    }
    response = requests.get(url, params=params, timeout=45)
    response.raise_for_status()
    payload = response.json()
    rows = [
        {
            "title": job.get("title"),
            "company": job.get("company", {}).get("display_name"),
            "location": job.get("location", {}).get("display_name"),
            "salary_min": job.get("salary_min"),
            "salary_max": job.get("salary_max"),
        }
        for job in payload.get("results", [])
    ]
    sample_df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
else:
    sample_df = pd.DataFrame(
        {
            "title": ["Configure ADZUNA_APP_ID and ADZUNA_APP_KEY to load live results"],
            "company": [""],
            "location": [""],
            "salary_min": [None],
            "salary_max": [None],
        }
    )

sample_df
```

## Preliminary results (mock)

| Role (example) | Count (fake) |
|----------------|--------------|
| Data Analyst   | 120          |
| Data Scientist | 90           |
| Data Engineer  | 161          |

## Summary (mock)

Replace this page with your full Quarto document when you are ready to publish the full analysis.
